		SKU: PATH-COLLECTION

						Description					
				
							
					
						Reviews (0)					
				
					
					
				
	Description

The Path Series Collection brings together all six titles in one purchase: The Freelancer’s Path, The Agency Path, The Coach’s Path, The Executive’s Path, The Leader’s Path, and The Retiree’s Path.
Six books on the interior experience of professional life — for the freelancer establishing a practice, the agency founder building an organisation, the coach developing their craft, the executive inhabiting a demanding role, the leader understanding what leadership actually asks, and the person entering retirement navigating a profound transition.
Each book is short, carefully written, and concerned with questions that most professional literature either avoids or oversimplifies. Buy the collection for $50 — six books for the price of five.

    (function() {
        /* Newsletter form submission (footer + popup) */
        document.querySelectorAll('.greenfields-newsletter-form').forEach(function(form) {
            form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                var email = form.querySelector('input[name="email"]').value;
                var formId = form.getAttribute('data-form-id') || '1';
                var msgEl = form.parentElement.querySelector('.greenfields-newsletter-message');
                var btn = form.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
                var origText = btn.textContent;
                btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
                btn.disabled = true;

                var postData = JSON.stringify({
                    form_id: formId,
                    email: email,
                    status: 'subscribed',
                    lists: [1]
                });

                fetch('http://greenfields.local/wp-json/mint-mail/v1/mint-form-submit', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        post_data: postData
                    })
                }).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(data) {
                    if (msgEl) {
                        msgEl.style.display = 'block';
                        msgEl.className = 'greenfields-newsletter-message success';
                        msgEl.textContent = 'Thank you! Check your inbox for your 10% discount code.';
                    }
                    form.style.display = 'none';
                }).catch(function() {
                    if (msgEl) {
                        msgEl.style.display = 'block';
                        msgEl.className = 'greenfields-newsletter-message error';
                        msgEl.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Please try again.';
                    }
                    btn.textContent = origText;
                    btn.disabled = false;
                });
            });
        });

        /* Also create contact directly as fallback */
        document.querySelectorAll('.greenfields-newsletter-form').forEach(function(form) {
            form.removeEventListener('submit', form._gfHandler);
        });

        /* Popup: show after 8 seconds if not dismissed */
        var popupKey = 'gf_popup_dismissed';
        if (!localStorage.getItem(popupKey)) {
            setTimeout(function() {
                var popup = document.getElementById('greenfields-newsletter-popup');
                if (popup) popup.style.display = 'flex';
            }, 8000);
        }

        /* Popup: close handlers */
        var popup = document.getElementById('greenfields-newsletter-popup');
        if (popup) {
            popup.querySelector('.gf-popup-close').addEventListener('click', function() {
                popup.style.display = 'none';
                localStorage.setItem(popupKey, '1');
            });
            popup.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target === popup) {
                    popup.style.display = 'none';
                    localStorage.setItem(popupKey, '1');
                }
            });
        }
    })();
